title: Describe remote access and site-to-site VPNs

questions.question: Which statement is correct about Generic Routing Encapsulation (GRE) tunnels?

correct.explanation: The correct answer is "GRE provides packet-in-packet encapsulation.".

incorrect.explanation: "GRE provides per-packet authentication." is incorrect because the scenario requires: The correct answer is "GRE provides packet-in-packet encapsulation.".
incorrect.misconceptionTested: Picking a familiar term without matching the exact behavior tested
